description: A pack of cotton rich baby girls socks with lace ribbon trim. They have a gentle elasticated double welt & a comfort toe seam. These socks are made from 78% cotton, 20% polyester with 2% elastane. 0-0 for Newborn (foot measures 8cm), 0-2.5 for up to 1 year (foot measures 10cm) & 3-5.5 for up to 2 years (foot measures 11.5cm)
